name: Skillet Spaghetti
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb ground chicken breast, skinless, cooked
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook spaghetti according to package directions; drain.
2. In a skillet, heat oil over medium heat.
3. Add onions, bell peppers, garlic, and chicken. Cook until chicken is no longer pink and vegetables are tender.
4. Stir in crushed tomatoes, basil, oregano, salt, black pepper, and red pepper flakes. Cook for 2 minutes.
5. Add spaghetti and toss to coat well. Sprinkle with parmesan cheese.
